description: Interactive animator that transforms a polygon from its current shape to a target polygon
utility: Animate polygon shape changes and transformations with play/reset control

arguments.name: sourcePolygon
arguments.description: Variable reference to an existing polygon to animate

arguments.name: targetPolygon
arguments.description: Target polygon expression (can be inline or variable reference)

arguments.name: styles
arguments.description: Optional styling: c(), s(), t(), defer(), etc.

examples.scenario: Animate polygon morph with deferred playback
examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(4,19), size(16), range(-5, 5), type(geometry))
polygon_1 = polygon(G, point(G, 0, 0), point(G, 4, 0), point(G, 4, 4), point(G, 0, 4))
polygon_2 = polygon(G, point(G, 1, 1), point(G, 3, 0), point(G, 3, 3), point(G, 0, 3))
polyanim_1 = polygonanimator(polygon_2, polygon_1, defer())

G = g2d(at(4,19), size(16), range(-5, 5), type(geometry))
tri_1 = polygon(G, point(G, 0, 0), point(G, 4, 0), point(G, 2, 3))
tri_2 = polygon(G, point(G, -1, -1), point(G, 5, -1), point(G, 2, 5))
polyanim_1 = polygonanimator(tri_1, tri_2)
